raw_log_normalization: pulled via `rtk proxy gh run view --job <id> --log` and stripped the leading <job>\t<step>\t prefix per line.
notes: Matrix-shaped failure on cpython's update_windows_tcltk branch. All 7 Windows configs failed (x64/Win32/arm64 × default/free-threading × switch-case/tail-call); all Linux/macOS variants passed (35 successes / 8 failures / 2 skipped in the parent run). The failing job is the canonical x64 switch-case Windows leg. test_tcl has 2 distinct failures: test_eval_surrogates_in_result (test_tcl.py:57) and test_evalfile_surrogates_in_result (test_tcl.py:292) — both AssertionError where `tcl.eval(...)` returns UTF-8 mojibake `<ðŸ’»>` instead of the expected surrogate pair `<\U0001f4bb>`. Root cause is the tcltk update on Windows breaking Unicode surrogate handling — Linux/macOS use system tcl/tk and aren't affected. multi_failure=true (2 distinct test failures sharing one root cause). Selected as Batch 3 case 2 + v2/stress case 2: fills both `matrix_or_monorepo_failure` (was 0/v2) and adds another multi_failure case. case.json uses test_assertion since case.schema.json doesn't yet support matrix_or_monorepo_failure (the v2 extension is only in case_tags.schema.json); tags.json uses matrix_or_monorepo_failure with a 'category mismatch justified' note in tags.notes.
